specs.tlaContent:
---- MODULE L2_auth ----
VARIABLES state, token
Init ==
    /\ state = "init"
    /\ token = FALSE

Register ==
    /\ state = "init"
    /\ state' = "registered"
    /\ token' = FALSE

Login ==
    /\ state = "registered"
    /\ state' = "authenticated"
    /\ token' = TRUE

Next ==
    \/ Register
    \/ Login

BusinessInvariant ==
    /\ TypeInvariant

TypeInvariant ==
    state \in {"init", "registered", "authenticated"}
====
